title: Rabbdudes Origins
description: This Is A Mod That Adds Some Of My Custom Origins To The Game
body:
This Mod Adds My Custom Origins To The Game.\
Currently there is 2 origins:

<details>
<summary>Boomborn</summary>
The Boomborn - A Descendant Of The Creeper Inheriting Many Of Their Intresting Features

  Impact:2
  
  Powers:
  
 Explode - You Can Explode At Will.
  
Small - You Are 80% Smaller.

Leafy Skin - You are part leaf - 7 Hearts Of Health.

Explosion Immunity - Immune to explosions. 

Fall Immunity - Immune to Fall Damage

</details>

<details>
<summary>Flutterfolk</summary>
The Flutterfolk - Soft and delicate Flitterfolk drift gracefully on tiny wings. Fragile and small, they eat plant-based foods.

  Impact:1
  
  Powers:

  Delicate Appetite - Your tiny body and fluttering metabolism can only handle the gentle nourishment of plants. Meaty foods feel heavy and unnatural, and your body refuses them.

  Fragile - description Your body is delicate, and your health is limited to just 5 hearts.

  Silken Drift - Your wings and light frame allow you to drift gently through the air, falling slowly and gracefully. Until You Choose To Plummet(Sneak).

  Small - Your body is diminutive, almost delicate like a leaf on the wind. This small stature allows for nimble movement and makes you less noticeable, but it also leaves you fragile.
  
  Wings - You have delicate wings that allow you to glide gracefully through the air.

</details>


<details> <summary>Mosskin</summary>

The Mosskin – Gentle, moss-grown forest folk born from damp earth and quiet groves.

Impact: 2

Powers:

Poison-Touched – Immune to poison effects.

Heavy and Slow – Your soft, spongy form moves slowly, granting permanent Slowness.

</details>

<details> <summary>Screechling</summary>

The Screechling – Tiny nocturnal bat-folk with fluttering wings and keen night vision.

Impact: 2

Powers:

Wings – You are born with permanent wings, allowing you to fly freely.

Night Vision – Darkness is your ally; you can always see clearly at night.

Small – Your body is tiny and lightweight, only 20% of a human’s size.

Fragile – You have reduced health due to your delicate frame.

Carnivore – You can only consume meat-based foods.

Fall Immunity – You take no fall damage, landing safely no matter the height.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Circuitborn</summary>
The Circuitborn - Part Human, Part Machine. Created with a singular purpose: to build, innovate, and master the world of redstone.

Impact: 2

Powers:

Duplication - You can duplicate redstone components by placing them alone in a crafting grid.

Size Shift - You can shrink yourself to fit within even the tightest wiring. (Sneak + Drop Item to toggle, 0.25x size)

Voltage Appetite - You can consume redstone dust, overcharging your circuits with Speed I, Haste II, and Jump Boost I for 15 seconds.

Resistant Body - Your reinforced chassis grants you 20 hearts of health.

Heavy Body - Your metallic frame makes you heavier and less agile.

Rusty Circuits - Water causes your circuits to rust, damaging you.

Enhanced Recognition - Your optical sensors can briefly activate, granting a short burst of Night Vision. (Secondary)

</details>
